---
ID: US-OLV-024
Title: Edit account name in topbar
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-18
Milestone: Normalize design tokens and responsive behavior

As a account manager
I want to rename the selected account from the topbar
So that the visible account name and stored record stay aligned

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Topbar displays the selected account name.
- [ ] When an account is selected, name changes call onAccountNameChange.
- [ ] Portfolio/all-account topbar states are not editable account names.

Notes: Topbar behavior was corrected across multiple visual QA commits.
